questions.statement:
<p>L is the sister of G. G is the son of M. M is married to D. D is the sister of E. E is the son of C. C is married to S. S is the sister of P.</p>

<p>How is L related to E?</p>

<p>In a seven-member family, there are 2 married couples. Rohit&nbsp;who is unmarried&nbsp;is the son of Mukesh.&nbsp;<span style="">Sonali</span><span style="">&nbsp;is the mother-in-law of Rina.</span>&nbsp;Tina is the Sister-in-law of Biplab.&nbsp;Raj is the grandson of Mukesh. Rina is Tina&#39;s only sister. Raj is <span style="">Tina&#39;s</span> nephew.&nbsp;How is Rohit related to Raj?&nbsp;</p>
Pointing to a photograph of a boy, Surbhi (female) said, &quot;He is the only son of my maternal uncle&#39;s father.&quot; How is Surbhi related to that boy?
X is the brother of Y, V is the mother of Y, M is the sister of V&#39;s husband, N is the brother of V, then how is the son of N related to Y?
